final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical step-by-step instructional diagram illustrating how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical step-by-step layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: setting up the docker environment / pulling the hermes image
  Step 2: running and configuring the hermes container
  Step 3: integrating glmcodingplan into the container
  Step 4: verification and final connection confirmation
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a technical / developer-tool direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" prominently; must include "hermes", "docker", "glmcodingplan" as labels within the relevant steps
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; each step must contain a small illustrative diagram or icon showing the action
Avoid: must avoid decorative clutter that obscures the technical clarity of each step
